Prism browser demo

P12 launch fixtures rendered via prism.mjs + <prism-chart>.

Serve from the repo root (e.g. python3 -m http.server) and open /testdata/browser/demo.html. Each <prism-chart> fetches a Scene JSON committed under testdata/cross_impl/ — the same inputs the cross-impl parity harness diffs Go vs JS on.

bar_basic

line_basic

layer_actual_vs_benchmark

pie

sankey_user_flow

Shared dataset registry demo

Three charts using two shared datasets — only two fetches occur:
